sentences.en: You tied your own shoelaces, well done!
sentences.zh: 你自己綁好鞋帶了，做得好！
sentences.ipa: /ju taɪd jʊɚ on ˈʃulesɪz wel dʌn/

sentences.en: Do you want seconds, or are you full?
sentences.zh: 你還要再一份，還是已經吃飽了？
sentences.ipa: /du ju wɑnt ˈsekəndz ɔr ɑr ju fʊl/

sentences.en: No more toys in bed, it's sleep time.
sentences.zh: 床上不放玩具了，該睡覺了。
sentences.ipa: /no mɔr tɔɪz ɪn bed ɪts slip taɪm/

sentences.en: Don't wander off, stay where I can see you.
sentences.zh: 不要亂跑，待在我看得到的地方。
sentences.ipa: /dont ˈwɑndɚ ɔf ste wer aɪ kæn si ju/

sentences.en: You can go on the seesaw with your friend.
sentences.zh: 你可以跟朋友一起玩蹺蹺板。
sentences.ipa: /ju kæn ɡo ɑn ðə ˈsisɔ wɪð jʊɚ frend/

sentences.en: Let's practice your class presentation tonight.
sentences.zh: 今晚我們來練習你的課堂報告吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets ˈpræktɪs jʊɚ klæs ˌprezənˈteʃən təˈnaɪt/

sentences.en: Double-check your math before you turn it in.
sentences.zh: 交出去之前再檢查一次數學。
sentences.ipa: /ˈdʌbəl tʃek jʊɚ mæθ bɪˈfɔr ju tɝn ɪt ɪn/

sentences.en: It made your friend happy when you shared.
sentences.zh: 你分享的時候讓朋友很開心。
sentences.ipa: /ɪt med jʊɚ frend ˈhæpi wen ju ʃerd/

sentences.en: Let's squeeze this pillow when we're mad.
sentences.zh: 生氣的時候我們來捏這個枕頭。
sentences.ipa: /lets skwiz ðɪs ˈpɪlo wen wɪɚ mæd/

sentences.en: I mean it, put your shoes away now.
sentences.zh: 我是認真的，現在把鞋子收好。
sentences.ipa: /aɪ min ɪt pʊt jʊɚ ʃuz əˈwe naʊ/

sentences.en: That took courage, I'm impressed.
sentences.zh: 那需要勇氣，我很佩服你。
sentences.ipa: /ðæt tʊk ˈkɝɪdʒ aɪm ɪmˈprest/

sentences.en: Wear your life jacket on the boat.
sentences.zh: 在船上要穿救生衣。
sentences.ipa: /wer jʊɚ laɪf ˈdʒækɪt ɑn ðə bot/

sentences.en: The doctor said you're healthy and strong.
sentences.zh: 醫生說你很健康又強壯。
sentences.ipa: /ðə ˈdɑktɚ sed jʊɚ ˈhelθi ənd strɔŋ/

sentences.en: It's polite to ask before you leave the table.
sentences.zh: 離開餐桌前先問一下比較有禮貌。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts pəˈlaɪt tu æsk bɪˈfɔr ju liv ðə ˈtebl/

sentences.en: Being a good friend means listening too.
sentences.zh: 當好朋友也要懂得傾聽。
sentences.ipa: /ˈbiɪŋ ə ɡʊd frend minz ˈlɪsənɪŋ tu/

sentences.en: It's rude to point at people, remember?
sentences.zh: 用手指著別人是不禮貌的，記得嗎？
sentences.ipa: /ɪts rud tu pɔɪnt æt ˈpipl rɪˈmembɚ/

sentences.en: Put on gloves, your hands will get cold.
sentences.zh: 戴上手套，不然手會冷。
sentences.ipa: /pʊt ɑn ɡlʌvz jʊɚ hændz wɪl ɡet kold/

sentences.en: Let's video chat with Grandma instead of watching cartoons.
sentences.zh: 我們跟奶奶視訊聊天，不要看卡通了。
sentences.ipa: /lets ˈvɪdio tʃæt wɪð ˈɡrænmɑ ɪnˈsted ʌv ˈwɑtʃɪŋ ˈkɑrtunz/

sentences.en: Everyone put on their costumes, let's take a photo.
sentences.zh: 大家都穿上裝扮了，我們來拍照吧。
sentences.ipa: /ˈevriwʌn pʊt ɑn ðer ˈkɑstjumz lets tek ə ˈfoto/

sentences.en: Let's return this book to the library tomorrow.
sentences.zh: 我們明天把這本書還給圖書館吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets rɪˈtɝn ðɪs bʊk tu ðə ˈlaɪbreri təˈmɑro/
